//exclude-note: bench/run.ts and bench/build/run.ts are the standalone CLI entries -- they import air-ts by relative SOURCE path (not the bare specifier), which would pull air-ts's source tree into THIS program and break rootDir. They are typechecked under bench/tsconfig.check.json (the same resolution tsx uses), not here. The other bench modules consume air-ts only via ../src (through the runtime's EngineHooks seam), so they typecheck cleanly here. Workspaces refactor (issue #85): src/tests here resolve the bare `air-ts` specifier via node_modules/air-ts -> the built dist/index.d.ts (real types, not an ambient stub); the parent tsconfig.json's project-reference on ../air-ts ensures `tsc -b` builds the dist first.
